title: DriveCommand
description: Brain -> car. Velocity command sent over USB serial. Wire format: 'DRV <linear_velocity> <angular_velocity> <stop>'.

linear_velocity.description: Forward velocity in m/s, forward positive.

angular_velocity.description: Yaw rate in rad/s, counter-clockwise positive.

stop.description: Optional hard stop. 1 overrides velocities and brakes.
